case_title: YI LING MEI VS. JOANNE TANG

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEI, YI LING ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED MAR-16-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, JOANNE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY MEI, YI LING AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, JOANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2012 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEI, YI LING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TANG, JOANNE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2012 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO MAY-01-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS TO APPEAR WITH A CANTONESE INTERPRETER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY NORAH UYEDA--CANTONESE INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2012 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO MAY-09-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CANTONESE INTERPRETER ORDERED FOR PLAINTIFF TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
